_comment: Weapon catalogue — loaded at server startup, referenced by per-floor weaponLoot pools in floor-scaling.json. Names match keys under client assets.json > weapons; the client uses the entity name to look up the sprite.

_axes.damage: NdM+K dice. Higher count/sides = higher base damage; the floor-level damageMultiplier on enemies does NOT apply to player weapons (those scale by player progression, not floor depth).
_axes.initiativeMod: Added to the wielder's initiative roll in combat. Knife is fastest (+5); Axe is slowest (-4).

_design: Each weapon sits on a speed/damage tradeoff curve: as damage rises, initiative drops. Knife is the fastest and weakest; Axe the slowest and hardest-hitting. Regular Sword is the starter — slightly off the Pareto frontier so chest drops feel like genuine upgrades, but unique on the +1 init slot. Avg damage progression: 2.5 → 3.5 → 5.5 → (4.5 starter) → 6.5 → 7.5 → 8.0 → 8.5 → 9.5.
